title: rosa alpina var. globosa
intro: Rosa alpina var. globosa, also known as the Alpine Rose or Globosa Rose, is a fragrant and edible rose species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of vitamin C and flavonoids. Rosa alpina var. globosa is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps.
